original_image_tags: A single page of handwritten notes in blue ink on off-white, aged paper. The text is written in cursive. There are two small black circles punched near the top center. The number "(8)" is written in the top right corner.

elements.description: A scanned handwritten document on aged, off-white paper. The page is filled with dense cursive handwriting in blue ink, discussing gravitational concepts involving the Moon, Earth, and Sun. Two distinct black circular holes, likely from a hole punch, are visible at the top margin. A small circled numeral '8' is written in the top right corner. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or other graphical elements are present; the page consists entirely of this handwritten text.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual elements: a single page of handwritten notes in blue cursive on aged off-white paper with two punched holes near the top center and a circled number '8' in the top right corner, with no photographs, sketches, or diagrams.
